subject: fix(graph): move node labels inside nodes with white text for readability
body:
Labels were positioned below nodes with text outlines against the page
background, making them hard to read and visually cluttered. Now labels
are centered inside nodes with bold white text, which provides high
contrast against all palette colors without needing outlines.

Tags: graph, cytoscape, labels, ui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
